title: Rehabilitation after amputation
description: Pre- and post-prosthetic gait and limb-loss recovery.
longDescription: Pre- and post-prosthetic rehabilitation for people adapting to limb loss — including residual-limb care, gait re-education, balance and load retraining, and the daily-function goals that restore independence and confidence.
bridge: The gait analysis and load-retraining this work demands sharpens every post-operative and return-to-sport case I take on.
